# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                use_remote_address: true
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: /api/users
                          route:
                            cluster: users_service
                            prefix_rewrite: /
                            timeout: 30s
                        - match:
                            prefix: /api/orders
                          route:
                            cluster: orders_service
                            prefix_rewrite: /
                            timeout: 30s
                        - match:
                            prefix: /api/payments
                          route:
                            cluster: payments_service
                            prefix_rewrite: /
                            timeout: 30s
                        - match:
                            prefix: /
                          direct_response:
                            status: 404
                            body:
                              inline_string: "Not Found"
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: users_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: users_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users.service.local
                      port_value: 8080
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: users.service.local
                      port_value: 8081
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext
          sni: users.service.local

    - name: orders_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: orders_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: orders.service.local
                      port_value: 8080
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}

    - name: payments_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 2s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: payments_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: payments.service.local
                      port_value: 8080
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 3
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy_admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
